moment_media_external_only.name: moment_media_external_only
moment_media_external_only.value: ("moment_media"."source_type" <> 'EXTERNAL') OR ("moment_media"."external_url" IS NOT NULL AND "moment_media"."storage_key" IS NULL)

moment_reports_target_check.name: moment_reports_target_check
moment_reports_target_check.value: ("moment_reports"."moment_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("moment_reports"."comment_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1
